# Tisza Digest

Tisza Digest (tiszadigest.com) is a free, independent English-language monitor of Magyar Péter and the Tisza Party (Tisztelet és Szabadság — Respect and Freedom) in Hungary. It aggregates and translates news from Hungarian and international sources, updated automatically throughout the day.

## What It Does

- Aggregates news about Magyar Péter and Tisza Party from Hungarian and international RSS sources
- Filters content by keywords to surface only relevant stories
- Classifies stories with topic alert tags: EU, Election, Court, Immigration, Corruption, Economy
- In-page reader mode with full article text
- YouTube video feed from key Hungarian political channels
- Dark mode support
- Completely free, no login required

## Who It Covers

- **Magyar Péter** — Hungarian opposition politician and leader of Tisza Party
- **Tisza Party** (Tisztelet és Szabadság / Respect and Freedom) — Hungarian centre-right opposition party
- Hungarian domestic politics, EU relations, elections, and rule-of-law issues

## Sources

### Hungarian News (in Hungarian)
- Telex — Magyar Péter dedicated feed
- Telex (Belföldi) — Hungarian domestic news
- 444 — Independent Hungarian news outlet

### International English Press
- Euronews
- VSquare — Central European investigative journalism
- Balkan Insight — Southeast and Central European reporting
- Transitions Online — Central/Eastern European affairs

### YouTube Channels
- Pottyondy Edina — Hungarian political commentator
- Magyar Péter — official channel
- Partizán — independent Hungarian political media
- ATV — Hungarian commercial news broadcaster
- RTL Hírek — Hungarian RTL news
- RTL Hungary

## Topic Alert Tags

Stories are automatically tagged by topic:
- **EU** — European Union, NATO, Brussels
- **Election** — elections, voting, campaigns, polls
- **Court** — legal proceedings, prosecution, trials
- **Immigration** — migration, border, refugees
- **Corruption** — corruption, fraud, scandal
- **Economy** — GDP, inflation, budget, cost of living

## Contact

- Email: news@tiszadigest.com
- Website: https://tiszadigest.com
